channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Veronica Roth releases new dystopian fantasy novel, Seek the Traitor’s Son
item.description: Veronica Roth, the acclaimed American author behind the Divergent trilogy, is back with her latest novel, Seek the Traitor’s Son. Written over five years through ten drafts, the book is a dystopian fa...

item.title: Ogun Governor Advocates Unity Among APC Aspirants, Offers Compensation for Non-Winning Candidates
item.description: Ogun State Governor, Dapo Abiodun, don call on all APC aspirants to respect local government zoning and dey pursue consensus as dem dey prepare for upcoming elections. During one strategic meeting for...

item.title: AERB clears installation of key reactor components at Kudankulam Units 5 and 6
item.description: In a significant advancement for India's nuclear energy programme, the Atomic Energy Regulatory Board (AERB) has granted permission for the installation of major reactor equipment at Units 5 and 6 of ...

item.title: WA couple sues Monash IVF after embryo mix-up leads to wrong baby being born
item.description: A West Australian couple has filed a negligence claim against Monash IVF after discovering that an IVF error at the clinic's Brisbane branch resulted in a baby being born to the wrong parents. The cou...

item.title: DJ Denno Dies During Clashes Between Police and Boda Boda Riders in Luanda
item.description: The tragic death of Dennis Omondi, widely known as DJ Denno, has left his fans, family, and friends deeply heartbroken. DJ Denno, a popular disc jockey in Vihiga County, was reportedly killed during v...

item.title: Kemi Badenoch discusses Britain's current priorities
item.description: The article explores Kemi Badenoch's perspective on what she believes should be Britain's foremost priority. During the interview, she shared insights that might not align with conventional public exp...

item.title: Apple Reaches $250 Million Settlement Over Siri AI Legal Dispute
item.description: Apple has agreed to settle a legal case involving its AI assistant, Siri, with a payment of $250 million. The case revolved around claims that Siri's artificial intelligence technology may have misled...

item.title: Machakos Mother Reunites with Daughter After 35 Years
item.description: In Machakos County, a deeply emotional reunion took place when Agnes Mwende met her daughter for the first time in 35 years. Mwende had left her daughter in 1991 following family disputes while living...

item.title: President Tinubu Commends Murtala Garo on Kano Deputy Governor Appointment
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don hala Murtala Sule Garo big congrats as dem appoint am new deputy governor for Kano State. Na Tuesday Governor Abba Kabir Yusuf swear Garo in after Garo dey nominated to fill ...

item.title: Court finds Musa Khawula in contempt for failing to retract defamatory claims about Julius Malema
item.description: The South Gauteng High Court in Johannesburg has found social media personality Musa Khawula in contempt of court after he refused to comply with an earlier order to retract defamatory statements abou...

item.title: Man living in Stanley Park for over three decades faces eviction as crews dismantle encampment
item.description: A man who has lived in Vancouver’s Stanley Park for more than 30 years is being evicted as park authorities dismantle his long-standing encampment. Christenson Bailey, who settled in the park around 1...

item.title: Priest opts not to become bishop of Tagbilaran Diocese
item.description: Fr. Gerard Saco Jr., a priest serving in the Diocese of Tagbilaran, Bohol, has decided not to accept Pope Leo XIV’s appointment for him to become the bishop of the diocese. He cited personal limitatio...

item.title: Government scraps Inland Rail project after $15 billion, raises questions on future transport priorities
item.description: The federal government has announced the cancellation of the controversial Inland Rail project, which has already cost taxpayers at least $15 billion. Infrastructure Minister Catherine King's office i...

item.title: Scooter catches fire outside BSF Punjab Frontier headquarters in Jalandhar
item.description: On the evening of May 5, 2026, a scooter parked near the Border Security Force (BSF) Chowk in Jalandhar, Punjab, suddenly caught fire, creating a scene of panic among local residents. The incident occ...

item.title: US temporarily pauses military escort of ships in Strait of Hormuz amid Iran deal progress
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced a temporary pause in the military operation known as 'Project Freedom', which was escorting commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz. The pause comes following...

item.title: Queensland government backs $2.1m Brisbane River zipline proposal
item.description: Plans to build a major zipline attraction across the Brisbane River have moved closer to becoming a reality after receiving $2.1 million in funding from the Queensland government. The proposed project...

item.title: Analysts Warn of Rising Risks in Future India-Pakistan Conflicts
item.description: On the first anniversary of the May 2025 India-Pakistan conflict, multiple US and international experts are cautioning that the next confrontation between the two nuclear-armed neighbours could be mor...

item.title: Tumbler Ridge Shooting Survivor Maya Gebala Recovers Successfully from Fifth Surgery
item.description: Maya Gebala, a 12-year-old who was critically injured during the mass shooting in Tumbler Ridge, B.C., has successfully undergone her fifth surgery, a cranioplasty, according to her father, David Geba...

item.title: Gujarat Board SSC 2026 Result Out: How to Check Class 10 Marks and Download Scorecard Online
item.description: The Gujarat Secondary and Higher Secondary Education Board (GSEB) has released the Class 10 Secondary School Certificate (SSC) results for 2026 on its official website gseb.org, along with backup port...

item.title: Portable Talks About How Olamide Helped His Career More Than Davido
item.description: Nigerian singer Portable don dey talk about the difference wey dey between how Olamide and Davido treat am for music industry. For one video wey dey circulate online, Portable yan say Olamide give am ...
